violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. - Open drink on prep table in kitchen.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found in kitchen without saniti bucket made.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. - Fryers are not under Homestyle hood

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition -Small cutting board found with a gouge out of the middle and deep cuts. Sent to landfill
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Shelving needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Tub of sauces on the handwash sink at time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling needs to be cleaned, Yellowing is taking place due to incorrect hood system.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. - Noodles found at 96F Sent to land fill
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
